title: RouteRecorder
description: A mod mainly for Wynncraft (But works anywhere) which records, saves and displays routes for you.
body:
### Hi!
Ever wish you could record your paths in Minecraft? With this mod, you can! Perfect for Wynncraft but works anywhere. Just start recording, and it’ll draw a line behind you as you go, so you can easily find your way back or follow your routes later. Your routes can be saved as well, and you can load any of your recordings whenever you like. Whether you’re running caves, farming, or just wandering around, this mod’s got your back!

For the time being the mod is only controllable through chat commands, keybind support might get added at a later date.

## The commands:
- **/route record**  (Starts recording a new route. !!!Will clear any ongoing route & recording!!!)
- **/route pause** (Pauses the recording. E.g if you need to fight a bunch of stuff and don't want the lines everywhere)
- **/route resume** (Resumes a paused recording)
- **/route undo** (Removes the 10 last recorded points. Good if you went the wrong way somewhere while recording)
- **/route save <filename>** (Saves the route to a file in your minecraft appdata directory. !!!Replace <filename> with any name you want for that route!!!)
- **/route list** (Displays a list of all your saved routes)
- **/route load <filename>** (Loads the saved route specified in the <filename> field. On wynncraft it will place the beacon at the route start point)
- **/route clear** (Clears the current route. Both activly recording and loaded routes will be cleared)
- **/route delete <filename>** (Deletes the route specified in the <filename> field)
- **/route linecolour <colour>** (Changes the colour of the line. Colours available: red, green, blue, purple, pink, black, white, yellow, orange)
- **/route positiondistance <value>** (Changes the distance between recorded points. Lower values = smoother lines. The default value is 0.5)
- **/route help** (Shows a similar menu to this but with slightly less information)

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

The super amazing complex design of the line was 100% an artistic choice and definitely not the only thing i could get working :3

Also, I discovered that [Wynntils](https://modrinth.com/mod/wynntils) already has this feature right after making this mod... Oh well :]
</details>

![Holding lantern in TPP with Rethinking Voxels shaders enabled](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/oA31v2d0/images/862a7024f924adcfa0a49c29aa88468c7b7beb4e.png)

If you find any bugs, have any suggestions for features, or have ideas for other mods like this, feel free to contact [me on Discord](https://discord.com/users/457706754847801355)
